          <div class="cat-card">
            <div class="cat-name">SupplyKai</div>
            <div class="cat-desc">Predicción de oferta según negocio</div>
            <div class="cat-price">desde USD 220</div>
            <a href="https://wa.me/593988463248?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20SupplyKai" target="_blank" class="cat-btn">Consultar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PAQUETES -->
      <div class="cat-section" data-cat="suite">
        <div class="cat-heading">
          <span class="cat-dot suite-dot"></span>Paquetes integrales
        </div>
        <div class="cat-grid">
          <div class="cat-card cat-card-featured">
            <div class="cat-badge">Más popular</div>
            <div class="cat-name">KaiSuite</div>
            <div class="cat-desc">Paquete completo de dashboards — producción, finanzas e inventario</div>
            <div class="cat-price">USD 320 <small>ahorra 10%</small></div>
            <a href="https://wa.me/593988463248?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20KaiSuite" target="_blank" class="cat-btn cat-btn-featured">Consultar</a>
          </div>
          <div class="cat-card cat-card-featured">
            <div class="cat-name">KaiPro Analytics</div>
            <div class="cat-desc">Línea completa de productos de análisis de datos</div>
            <div class="cat-price">USD 350 <small>ahorra 12%</small></div>
            <a href="https://wa.me/593988463248?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20KaiPro%20Analytics" target="_blank" class="cat-btn cat-btn-featured">Consultar</a>
          </div>
          <div class="cat-card cat-card-featured">
            <div class="cat-name">KaiPro ML</div>
            <div class="cat-desc">Línea de soluciones de inteligencia artificial para tu operación</div>
            <div class="cat-price">USD 310 <small>ahorra 15%</small></div>
            <a href="https://wa.me/593988463248?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20KaiPro%20ML" target="_blank" class="cat-btn cat-btn-featured">Consultar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- end modal-body -->

    <div class="modal-footer">
      ¿No sabes cuál elegir? 
      <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20necesito%20ayuda%20para%20elegir%20un%20producto%20KAIPRO" target="_blank">Escríbenos y te asesoramos gratis →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ===== NUEVAS TARJETAS DE HERRAMIENTAS ===== */
  .services-divider{
    text-align:center;
    padding:48px 0 24px;
  }
  .services-sub-title{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:20px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--navy);
    position:relative;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .services-sub-title::before,.services-sub-title::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    top:50%; width:60px; height:1px;
    background:var(--line);
  }
  .services-sub-title::before{right:calc(100% + 16px);}
  .services-sub-title::after{left:calc(100% + 16px);}

  .ladder-3{ margin-top:0; }
  .service-tool{ border-top:3px solid transparent; }
  .service-tool:nth-child(1){ border-top-color:#217346; }
  .service-tool:nth-child(2){ border-top-color:var(--teal); }
  .service-tool:nth-child(3){ border-top-color:#7c3aed; }

  .tool-icon{
    width:48px; height:48px;
    border-radius:14px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    margin-bottom:16px;
  }
  .tool-icon svg{ width:24px; height:24px; }
  .excel-icon{ background:rgba(33,115,70,0.1); color:#217346; }
  .geo-icon{ background:rgba(26,167,199,0.1); color:var(--teal); }
  .ai-icon{ background:rgba(124,58,237,0.1); color:#7c3aed; }

  .tool-products{
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .tool-products span{
    font-size:11.5px; font-weight:600;
    background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }

  .catalog-cta{
    text-align:center;
    padding:32px 0 8px;
  }

  /* ===== GALERÍA DE FOTOS DEL EVENTO ===== */
  .event-gallery{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:10px;
    margin-top:20px;
    border-radius:16px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .event-photo{
    width:100%; height:170px;
    object-fit:cover;
    transition:transform 0.3s, filter 0.3s;
    cursor:zoom-in;
    filter:brightness(0.95);
  }
  .event-photo:hover{ transform:scale(1.03); filter:brightness(1.08); z-index:1; position:relative; }
  .event-photo-wide{
    grid-column:span 2;
    height:220px;
  }

  .about-grid{
    align-items:start !important;
  }

  /* ===== MODAL PORTAFOLIO DIGITAL - DARK NAVY + AI ANIMATIONS ===== */
  .modal-overlay{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:1000;
    background:rgba(4,10,24,0.88);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    padding:16px;
    opacity:0; pointer-events:none;
    transition:opacity 0.35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  }
  .modal-overlay.open{ opacity:1; pointer-events:all; }
  .modal-box{
    background:linear-gradient(140deg, #0d1f3c 0%, #0a1628 60%, #091220 100%);
    border:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.3);
    border-radius:20px;
    width:100%; max-width:900px;
    max-height:92vh;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    box-shadow:0 40px 100px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 0 80px -30px rgba(26,167,199,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    transform:translateY(24px) scale(0.96);
    transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  /* Animated AI background grid */
  .modal-box::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(26,167,199,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(26,167,199,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size:40px 40px;
    mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 0%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
    pointer-events:none;
    z-index:0;
  }
  /* Glowing orb top-right */
  .modal-box::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    top:-100px; right:-100px;
    width:300px; height:300px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,167,199,0.2), transparent 70%);
    pointer-events:none;
    z-index:0;
    animation:modalOrb 6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes modalOrb{
    0%{ transform:scale(1) translate(0,0); opacity:0.6; }
    100%{ transform:scale(1.3) translate(-30px,20px); opacity:1; }
  }
  .modal-overlay.open .modal-box{ transform:translateY(0) scale(1); }

  .modal-header{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;
    padding:28px 32px 20px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.15);
    flex-shrink:0;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .modal-header .eyebrow{
    color:var(--teal-light);
    background:rgba(95,211,238,0.1);
    border-color:rgba(95,211,238,0.25);
    margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .modal-header .eyebrow::before{ background:var(--teal-light); }
  .modal-header h2{ color:#fff; font-size:22px; }

  .modal-close{
    width:36px; height:36px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius:50%;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); cursor:pointer;
    font-size:16px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    transition:all 0.2s; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .modal-close:hover{ background:var(--teal); color:var(--navy); border-color:var(--teal); transform:rotate(90deg); }

  /* AI Animation bar below header */
  .modal-ai-bar{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:16px;
    padding:10px 32px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.1);
    flex-shrink:0;
    overflow:hidden;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.03);
  }
  .ai-metric{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    gap:4px;
    flex:1;
  }
  .ai-label{
    font-size:10px;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }
  /* Demand chart animation */
  .ai-chart{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-end;
    gap:2px;
    height:28px;
  }
  .ai-bar-item{
    width:4px;
    border-radius:2px 2px 0 0;
    background:var(--teal);
    animation:barRise 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    transform-origin:bottom;
  }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(1){ height:40%; animation-delay:0s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(2){ height:65%; animation-delay:0.1s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(3){ height:45%; animation-delay:0.2s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(4){ height:80%; animation-delay:0.15s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(5){ height:55%; animation-delay:0.25s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(6){ height:90%; animation-delay:0.05s; background:var(--teal-light); }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(7){ height:70%; animation-delay:0.3s; }
  .ai-bar-item:nth-child(8){ height:50%; animation-delay:0.2s; }
  @keyframes barRise{
    0%{ transform:scaleY(0.5); opacity:0.6; }
    100%{ transform:scaleY(1); opacity:1; }
  }
  /* Inventory stock animation */
  .ai-stock{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:4px;
    height:28px;
  }
  .stock-circle{
    width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%;
    animation:stockPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  .stock-circle:nth-child(1){ background:#ff6b6b; animation-delay:0s; }
  .stock-circle:nth-child(2){ background:#ffd93d; animation-delay:0.3s; }
  .stock-circle:nth-child(3){ background:#6bcb77; animation-delay:0.6s; }
  .stock-circle:nth-child(4){ background:#1aa7c7; animation-delay:0.9s; }
  .stock-circle:nth-child(5){ background:#5fd3ee; animation-delay:1.2s; }
  @keyframes stockPulse{
    0%,100%{ transform:scale(0.8); opacity:0.5; }
    50%{ transform:scale(1.4); opacity:1; }
  }
  /* Cash flow wave */
  .ai-wave{
    width:80px; height:28px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .ai-wave svg{ width:100%; height:100%; }
  .wave-path{
    fill:none;
    stroke:var(--teal);
    stroke-width:2;
    stroke-dasharray:200;
    stroke-dashoffset:200;
    animation:waveDraw 2s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes waveDraw{
    0%{ stroke-dashoffset:200; }
    60%{ stroke-dashoffset:0; }
    100%{ stroke-dashoffset:-200; }
  }
  /* KPI number ticker */
  .ai-ticker{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:22px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--teal-light);
    animation:tickerGlow 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  @keyframes tickerGlow{
    0%{ text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(26,167,199,0.3); }
    100%{ text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(95,211,238,0.8); color:#fff; }
  }
  /* Divider between metrics */
  .ai-divider{
    width:1px; height:32px;
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.2);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .modal-tabs{
    display:flex; gap:6px;
    padding:16px 32px 0;
    flex-shrink:0; flex-wrap:wrap;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .tab-btn{
    padding:8px 16px; border-radius:30px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); cursor:pointer;
    font-size:13px; font-weight:500;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    transition:all 0.2s;
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  }
  .tab-btn.active{
    background:var(--teal); color:var(--navy);
    border-color:var(--teal);
    font-weight:700;
    box-shadow:0 4px 16px -8px rgba(26,167,199,0.6);
  }
  .tab-btn:hover:not(.active){
    border-color:var(--teal-light);
    color:var(--teal-light);
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.08);
  }
  .modal-body{
    overflow-y:auto; padding:20px 32px;
    flex:1;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
    scrollbar-width:thin;
    scrollbar-color:rgba(26,167,199,0.3) transparent;
  }
  .modal-body::-webkit-scrollbar{ width:4px; }
  .modal-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track{ background:transparent; }
  .modal-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{ background:rgba(26,167,199,0.3); border-radius:4px; }

  .cat-section{ display:none; animation:fadeIn 0.3s ease; }
  .cat-section.active{ display:block; }
  .cat-heading{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:15px; font-weight:600;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    margin-bottom:14px; margin-top:8px;
  }
  .cat-dot{ width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; }
  .excel-dot{ background:#22c55e; box-shadow:0 0 6px #22c55e; }
  .geo-dot{ background:var(--teal); box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--teal); }
  .ai-dot{ background:#a78bfa; box-shadow:0 0 6px #a78bfa; }
  .suite-dot{ background:var(--teal-light); box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--teal-light); }

  .cat-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(210px,1fr));
    gap:12px; margin-bottom:28px;
  }
  .cat-card{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius:14px; padding:16px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transition:transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    position:relative;
  }
  .cat-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-3px);
    border-color:rgba(26,167,199,0.4);
    box-shadow:0 12px 28px -14px rgba(26,167,199,0.3);
  }
  .cat-card-featured{
    border-color:rgba(26,167,199,0.4);
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.06);
  }
  .cat-badge{
    position:absolute; top:-10px; left:16px;
    background:var(--teal); color:var(--navy);
    font-size:10px; font-weight:700;
    padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 12px -6px rgba(26,167,199,0.6);
  }
  .cat-name{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:14px; font-weight:700;
    color:#fff; margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .cat-desc{
    font-size:12.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    flex:1; margin-bottom:10px; line-height:1.5;
  }
  .cat-price{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:15px; font-weight:700;
    color:var(--teal-light); margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .cat-price small{
    font-size:10px; font-weight:500;
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.15);
    color:var(--teal-light); padding:2px 8px;
    border-radius:20px; margin-left:6px;
  }
  .cat-btn{
    display:block; text-align:center;
    padding:8px 14px; border-radius:30px;
    font-size:12.5px; font-weight:600;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    transition:all 0.2s;
  }
  .cat-btn:hover{ background:var(--teal); color:var(--navy); border-color:var(--teal); }
  .cat-btn-featured{ background:var(--teal); color:var(--navy); border-color:var(--teal); font-weight:700; }
  .cat-btn-featured:hover{ background:var(--teal-light); border-color:var(--teal-light); }

  .modal-footer{
    padding:14px 32px;
    border-top:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.15);
    font-size:13px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    text-align:center; flex-shrink:0;
    position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .modal-footer a{ color:var(--teal-light); font-weight:600; }
  .modal-footer a:hover{ color:#fff; }
</style>

<!-- ===== MODAL DESCARGA DEMO ===== -->
<div id="downloadModal" class="modal-overlay" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Descarga la demo de KAIPRO">
  <div class="modal-box dl-modal-box">
    <div class="dl-header">
      <div class="dl-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal-light);margin-bottom:4px">Demo gratuita</div>
        <h2 style="color:#fff;font-size:20px;margin:0">Descarga el Dashboard Integral</h2>
        <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-size:13px;margin:6px 0 0">Completa tus datos y recibes el archivo en segundos</p>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeDownloadModal()" aria-label="Cerrar">✕</button>
    </div>

    <div class="dl-body">
      <!-- Beneficios rápidos -->
      <div class="dl-benefits">
        <div class="dl-benefit"><span class="dl-check">✔</span> 6 módulos integrados</div>
        <div class="dl-benefit"><span class="dl-check">✔</span> 391 fórmulas automáticas</div>
        <div class="dl-benefit"><span class="dl-check">✔</span> Semáforos y gráficos incluidos</div>
        <div class="dl-benefit"><span class="dl-check">✔</span> 100% personalizable</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Formulario -->
      <div class="dl-form">
        <div class="dl-field">
          <label class="dl-label" for="dl-nombre">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
            Nombre completo *
          </label>
          <input id="dl-nombre" class="dl-input" type="text" placeholder="Ej: Carlos Rodríguez" autocomplete="name">
          <span class="dl-error" id="err-nombre"></span>
        </div>

        <div class="dl-field">
          <label class="dl-label" for="dl-empresa">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M16 7V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v2"/></svg>
            Empresa *
          </label>
          <input id="dl-empresa" class="dl-input" type="text" placeholder="Ej: Industrias ABC S.A." autocomplete="organization">
          <span class="dl-error" id="err-empresa"></span>
        </div>

        <div class="dl-field">
          <label class="dl-label" for="dl-correo">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
            Correo electrónico *
          </label>
          <input id="dl-correo" class="dl-input" type="email" placeholder="correo@empresa.com" autocomplete="email">
          <span class="dl-error" id="err-correo"></span>
        </div>

        <div class="dl-field">
          <label class="dl-label" for="dl-celular">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px"><rect x="5" y="2" width="14" height="20" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12.01" y2="18"/></svg>
            Celular / WhatsApp *
          </label>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
            <select id="dl-pais" class="dl-input dl-select" style="width:110px;flex-shrink:0">
              <option value="593">🇪🇨 +593</option>
              <option value="57">🇨🇴 +57</option>
              <option value="51">🇵🇪 +51</option>
              <option value="56">🇨🇱 +56</option>
              <option value="52">🇲🇽 +52</option>
              <option value="54">🇦🇷 +54</option>
              <option value="1">🇺🇸 +1</option>
            </select>
            <div style="flex:1">
              <input id="dl-celular" class="dl-input" type="tel" placeholder="99 719 9748" autocomplete="tel" style="width:100%">
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="dl-error" id="err-celular"></span>
        </div>

        <button class="dl-submit" id="dl-submit-btn" onclick="submitDownload()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:16px;height:16px"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
          Descargar demo gratis
        </button>

        <p class="dl-note">Al descargar, se abrirá WhatsApp para confirmarte la recepción. Sin spam, sin compromisos.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Estado de éxito -->
      <div class="dl-success" id="dl-success" style="display:none">
        <div class="dl-success-icon">🎉</div>
        <h3>¡Descarga iniciada!</h3>
        <p>Tu archivo está descargándose. Te contactaremos pronto por WhatsApp para resolver cualquier duda.</p>
        <button class="dl-submit" onclick="closeDownloadModal()" style="margin-top:8px">Cerrar</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ===== BOTÓN DESCARGA DEMO ===== */
  .btn-download-demo{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, #217346, #1a5c38) !important;
    color:#fff !important;
    border-color:#217346 !important;
    display:inline-flex !important;
    align-items:center;
    gap:6px;
    font-weight:600 !important;
    box-shadow:0 4px 14px -6px rgba(33,115,70,0.5);
    transition:all 0.2s !important;
  }
  .btn-download-demo:hover{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, #1a5c38, #145c2e) !important;
    transform:translateY(-2px) !important;
    box-shadow:0 8px 20px -8px rgba(33,115,70,0.6) !important;
  }

  /* ===== MODAL DESCARGA ===== */
  .dl-modal-box{
    max-width:520px !important;
    max-height:92vh;
  }
  .dl-header{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:14px;
    padding:24px 28px 20px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.15);
    flex-shrink:0;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .dl-icon{
    width:44px;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.15);
    border-radius:12px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    color:var(--teal-light);
  }
  .dl-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;}
  .dl-body{
    padding:24px 28px;
    overflow-y:auto;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .dl-benefits{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:8px;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .dl-benefit{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:6px;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }
  .dl-check{
    color:var(--teal-light);
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:13px;
  }
  .dl-form{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:14px;
  }
  .dl-field{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:5px;
  }
  .dl-label{
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:5px;
  }
  .dl-input{
    width:100%;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:11px 14px;
    font-size:14px;
    color:#fff;
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    transition:border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    outline:none;
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  .dl-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);}
  .dl-input:focus{
    border-color:var(--teal);
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.08);
  }
  .dl-input.error{
    border-color:#ff6b6b;
    background:rgba(255,107,107,0.07);
    animation:shake 0.35s ease;
  }
  .dl-select{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    cursor:pointer;
    padding:11px 8px;
  }
  .dl-select option{background:#0d1f3c;color:#fff;}
  .dl-error{
    font-size:11.5px;
    color:#ff8a8a;
    min-height:14px;
    display:block;
  }
  .dl-submit{
    width:100%;
    padding:14px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal), #1280a0);
    color:var(--navy);
    border:none;
    border-radius:12px;
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    cursor:pointer;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:8px;
    transition:all 0.2s;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px -10px rgba(26,167,199,0.5);
    margin-top:4px;
  }
  .dl-submit:hover{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-light), var(--teal));
    transform:translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow:0 12px 28px -10px rgba(26,167,199,0.6);
  }
  .dl-submit:active{transform:translateY(0);}
  .dl-submit:disabled{opacity:0.6;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;}
  .dl-note{
    font-size:11px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    text-align:center;
    margin:4px 0 0;
    line-height:1.5;
  }
  .dl-success{
    text-align:center;
    padding:20px 0 10px;
  }
  .dl-success-icon{font-size:48px;margin-bottom:12px;}
  .dl-success h3{color:#fff;font-size:20px;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .dl-success p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;}

  @keyframes shake{
    0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
    25%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
    75%{transform:translateX(6px);}
  }
  @keyframes spin{
    to{transform:rotate(360deg);}
  }
</style>

<script>
  // Scroll reveal
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var targets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-stagger');
    if(!('IntersectionObserver' in window)){
      targets.forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('is-visible'); });
      return;
    }
    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(entry){
        if(entry.isIntersecting){
          entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
          observer.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
    targets.forEach(function(el){ observer.observe(el); });
  });
  // Mobile menu
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var toggle = document.querySelector('.menu-toggle');
    var nav = document.querySelector('.nav-links');
    if(toggle && nav){
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var isOpen = nav.classList.toggle('open');
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen);
      });
    }
  });

  function openDownloadModal(){
    document.getElementById('downloadModal').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
    // Reset form
    ['dl-nombre','dl-empresa','dl-correo','dl-celular'].forEach(function(id){
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(el){ el.value=''; el.classList.remove('error'); }
    });
    ['err-nombre','err-empresa','err-correo','err-celular'].forEach(function(id){
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(el) el.textContent='';
    });
    document.getElementById('dl-success').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('dl-submit-btn').style.display='flex';
    document.querySelector('.dl-form').style.display='flex';
  }

  function closeDownloadModal(){
    document.getElementById('downloadModal').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var dlOverlay = document.getElementById('downloadModal');
    if(dlOverlay){
      dlOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        if(e.target===this) closeDownloadModal();
      });
    }
  });

  function validateEmail(email){
    return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/.test(email.trim());
  }
  function validatePhone(phone){
    var digits = phone.replace(/\D/g,'');
    return digits.length >= 7 && digits.length <= 12;
  }
  function validateName(name){
    return name.trim().length >= 3;
  }

  function setError(fieldId, errId, msg){
    var field = document.getElementById(fieldId);
    var err   = document.getElementById(errId);
    if(field) field.classList.add('error');
    if(err)   err.textContent = msg;
  }
  function clearError(fieldId, errId){
    var field = document.getElementById(fieldId);
    var err   = document.getElementById(errId);
    if(field) field.classList.remove('error');
    if(err)   err.textContent = '';
  }

  // Real-time validation
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var pairs = [
      ['dl-nombre',  'err-nombre',  function(v){ return validateName(v) ? '' : 'Ingresa tu nombre completo (mín. 3 caracteres)'; }],
      ['dl-empresa', 'err-empresa', function(v){ return v.trim().length>=2 ? '' : 'Ingresa el nombre de tu empresa'; }],
      ['dl-correo',  'err-correo',  function(v){ return validateEmail(v) ? '' : 'Correo inválido (ej: nombre@empresa.com)'; }],
      ['dl-celular', 'err-celular', function(v){ return validatePhone(v) ? '' : 'Celular inválido (mínimo 7 dígitos)'; }],
    ];
    pairs.forEach(function(pair){
      var el = document.getElementById(pair[0]);
      if(!el) return;
      el.addEventListener('blur', function(){
        var msg = pair[2](this.value);
        if(msg) setError(pair[0], pair[1], msg);
        else    clearError(pair[0], pair[1]);
      });
      el.addEventListener('input', function(){
        if(this.classList.contains('error')){
          var msg = pair[2](this.value);
          if(!msg) clearError(pair[0], pair[1]);
        }
      });
    });
  });

  function submitDownload(){
    var nombre  = document.getElementById('dl-nombre').value.trim();
    var empresa = document.getElementById('dl-empresa').value.trim();
    var correo  = document.getElementById('dl-correo').value.trim();
    var celular = document.getElementById('dl-celular').value.trim();
    var pais    = document.getElementById('dl-pais').value;
    var valid   = true;

    // Limpiar errores
    ['dl-nombre','dl-empresa','dl-correo','dl-celular'].forEach(function(id){ clearError(id, 'err-'+id.replace('dl-','')); });

    if(!validateName(nombre)){
      setError('dl-nombre','err-nombre','Ingresa tu nombre completo (mín. 3 caracteres)'); valid=false;
    }
    if(empresa.length < 2){
      setError('dl-empresa','err-empresa','Ingresa el nombre de tu empresa'); valid=false;
    }
    if(!validateEmail(correo)){
      setError('dl-correo','err-correo','Correo inválido (ej: nombre@empresa.com)'); valid=false;
    }
    if(!validatePhone(celular)){
      setError('dl-celular','err-celular','Celular inválido (mínimo 7 dígitos)'); valid=false;
    }
    if(!valid) return;

    // Botón cargando
    var btn = document.getElementById('dl-submit-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:16px;height:16px;animation:spin 1s linear infinite"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-6.219-8.56"/></svg> Procesando...';

    setTimeout(function(){
      // 1. Descargar el archivo Excel demo
      var link = document.createElement('a');
      link.href = 'KaiPro_Demo_Integral.xlsx';
      link.download = 'KaiPro_Demo_Integral.xlsx';
      document.body.appendChild(link);
      link.click();
      document.body.removeChild(link);

      // 2. Abrir WhatsApp con los datos del lead
      var celFull = '+' + pais + celular.replace(/\D/g,'');
      var msg = encodeURIComponent(
        '🔔 *NUEVO LEAD — Demo KAIPRO*\n\n' +
        '👤 *Nombre:* ' + nombre + '\n' +
        '🏢 *Empresa:* ' + empresa + '\n' +
        '📧 *Correo:* ' + correo + '\n' +
        '📱 *Celular:* ' + celFull + '\n\n' +
        '✅ Descargó la demo del Dashboard Integral\n' +
        '📅 ' + new Date().toLocaleString('es-EC', {timeZone:'America/Guayaquil'})
      );
      setTimeout(function(){
        window.open('https://wa.me/593988463248?text=' + msg, '_blank');
      }, 800);

      // 3. Mostrar éxito
      document.querySelector('.dl-form').style.display='none';
      document.getElementById('dl-success').style.display='block';
    }, 1200);
  }

  function openCatalog(tab){
    document.getElementById('catalogModal').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
    switchTab(tab, document.querySelector(`.tab-btn[onclick="switchTab('${tab}',this)"]`) || document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')[0]);
    // Start savings ticker animation
    startSavingsTicker();
  }

  var savingsInterval = null;
  function startSavingsTicker(){
    var el = document.getElementById('savingsTicker');
    if(!el) return;
    var val = 0;
    var target = 15840;
    clearInterval(savingsInterval);
    val = 0;
    savingsInterval = setInterval(function(){
      val += Math.floor(Math.random()*450 + 200);
      if(val >= target){ val = target; clearInterval(savingsInterval); }
      el.textContent = '$' + val.toLocaleString();
    }, 60);
  }
  function closeCatalog(){
    document.getElementById('catalogModal').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  }
  function switchTab(tab, btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    if(btn) btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-section').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
    if(tab==='all'){
      document.querySelectorAll('.cat-section').forEach(s=>s.classList.add('active'));
    } else {
      const sec = document.querySelector(`.cat-section[data-cat="${tab}"]`);
      if(sec) sec.classList.add('active');
    }
  }
  document.getElementById('catalogModal').addEventListener('click', function(e){
    if(e.target===this) closeCatalog();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key==='Escape') closeCatalog();
  });
  // Init: show all on open
  switchTab('all', document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')[0]);
</script>
</body>
</html>
